title: hieracium pallescens subsp. parengense
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. parengense is a subspecies of the Hieracium pallescens plant, commonly known as a type of hawkweed. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pallescens subsp. parengense include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
